calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2005 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-18-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for 2nd Amended Petition of Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rhonda Fung.
Ronald Wecht, Esq. for Petitioner: Martiniano Sanchez, present as Guardian at litem for: Anthony Sanchez, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Settlement in the amount of $815,000.00
Attorney's Fees $183,103.87
Unpaid Medical Expenses $187,771.88
Costs $39,300.47
The remaining proceeds of $404,817.78 to be transferred to the Anthony Sanchez Special Needs Trust, established under Probate Code Section 3604.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2005 Continued To Dec-06-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
